hero.title: Build <accent>freedom</accent> so businesses can <accent>break through</accent>
hero.description: We create flexible, intelligent platforms that reduce complexity, empower teams, and open more room for businesses to grow.

intro.description: From a small journey 17 years ago, <brand>XIPAT</brand> has grown with thousands of merchants and become a trusted global e-commerce technology builder.

about.title: We believe in the liberating power of <accent>technology</accent>
about.description1: The <brand>XIPAT</brand> team builds technology from deep human understanding to support entrepreneurs, sellers, and e-commerce teams to grow with stability, flexibility, and confidence in global markets.
about.description2: From small operational details to major leaps, Xipat stands with businesses to grow steadily, strongly, and meaningfully.

cards.title:
Omega
theme
cards.body: OmegaTheme delivers a compact toolkit for global sellers - from tracking and automation to conversion management - reducing complexity, optimizing operations, and scaling sustainably.

cards.title: Game Zoka
cards.body: OmegaTheme delivers a compact toolkit for global sellers - from tracking and automation to conversion management - reducing complexity, optimizing operations, and scaling sustainably.

solutions.title: Different Solutions For A Constantly Changing World

items.body: We focus on research and development of products with real value - meticulous in every detail, precise in every function, and strong enough to solve business problems end-to-end.
XIPAT technology is built to empower: helping entrepreneurs and teams become more confident, proactive, and sustainable.
In a changing world, we continuously adjust and update quickly - so businesses have stable tools and stay ready for every next move.

values.title: Empathy
values.body: Always think of others first, creating value for teammates, customers, and society.

values.title: Growth mindset
values.body: Continuously learn and improve every day to develop ourselves and build a sustainable organization.

values.title: Healthy spirit
values.body: Physical and mental health are the foundation for productive work and bigger ambitions.

values.title: Pursue the highest standards
values.body: Set and uphold high standards in thinking, people, and quality of work.

seo.title: Xipat | Technology that helps businesses break through
seo.description: Xipat builds technology platforms and solutions that reduce complexity, optimize operations, and drive sustainable growth.

hero.title: Application ecosystem for global eCommerce.
hero.description: OmegaTheme delivers a compact solution suite that helps sellers run operations more smoothly, optimize performance, and scale confidently across leading eCommerce platforms.

operation.descriptionBefore: has grown into a team of
operation.descriptionAfter: and serving tens of thousands of customers across multiple platforms.

items.title: Deep eCommerce expertise
items.description: Every OmegaTheme app is built from real merchant challenges. We understand where businesses struggle and build practical solutions that deliver measurable outcomes.

items.title: Dedicated support and partnership
items.description: Our team supports you throughout operations and provides stage-by-stage guidance so you can make faster, better decisions.

items.title: Operational optimization
items.description: Standardize workflows and automate repetitive tasks to reduce operating cost, improve performance, and minimize system errors.

items.title: Innovation based on real needs
items.description: The product roadmap is shaped by real merchant feedback so every update stays close to actual business needs.

items.name: Synctrack
items.description: A 4-app ecosystem that optimizes the post-purchase experience

items.name: Blockify
items.description: Enhances security to keep operations uninterrupted

items.name: Quotesnap
items.description: Supports B2B operations with easier quoting and faster conversion

items.name: Consentik
items.description: Helps merchants comply with global data regulations

items.name: Pareto
items.description: Optimizes sales strategy and smart operations

items.name: TagFly
items.description: Set up multi-channel tracking quickly and accurately

items.name: Trustify
items.description: Manage customer reviews and improve conversion sustainably

seo.description: Explore OmegaTheme ecosystem apps that help eCommerce businesses streamline operations, improve performance, and scale globally.

hero.description: We build an environment where every individual is trusted, empowered to grow, and united to create long-term value for customers, teammates, and the community.

values.title: The values that define how we work

items.title: Empathy
items.body: We listen to understand real needs and act for the shared benefit of customers, teammates, and partners.

items.title: Growth mindset
items.body: We continuously learn, experiment, and improve so each version of us is better than yesterday.

items.title: Healthy spirit
items.body: We maintain physical and mental well-being to work sustainably, stay positive, and pursue bigger goals.

items.title: High standards
items.body: We pursue quality in every detail with ownership, discipline, and commitment to the final result.

items.title: Xipat Internal Badminton Tournament 2025
items.body: A fair-play spirit that strengthens cross-team connection and spreads positive energy beyond work hours.

items.title: Xipat celebrates 50 years of reunification
items.body: Meaningful activities helping teams connect with history while nurturing pride and gratitude.

items.title: Xipat Hackathon 2025
items.body: A space where new ideas are tested quickly to build practical solutions for products and operations.

items.title: Q1 team building with strong emotions
items.body: A bonding journey that deepens trust and strengthens teamwork for long-term goals.

cta.titleLine1: Do you want to grow your career
cta.description: We are always looking for teammates with a positive mindset and the courage to make a difference.

cultureGuidedShowcase.heading: A workplace guided by clear and lived culture

items.title: Healthy spirit
items.description: At XIPAT, we work with optimism, ownership, and steady discipline to keep strong momentum and spread positive energy together.

items.title: Empathy
items.description: We listen first, understand context, and support one another so teams can move fast while staying kind and respectful.

items.title: Growth mindset
items.description: We keep learning from experiments, feedback, and outcomes, then turn those lessons into practical improvements every week.

items.title: High standards
items.description: From planning to delivery, we hold ourselves accountable for quality in details so every output is reliable and useful.
